name: Smor Kranser
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and gradually add sugar.
2. Add the egg yolk, then mix in the flour until combined.
3. Set aside and let cool enough to handle easily for rolling out.
4. Break off a piece of dough about the size of a walnut.
5. Roll out the dough and cross one end over the other to form a wreath.
6. Brush the top with beaten egg white, then sprinkle with colored sugar.
7. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 400°F until lightly browned.
Recipe from Grandma Ruby Brush.
